description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a full military-style uniform with a digital camouflage pattern. He wears a wide-brimmed helmet and dark sunglasses, giving him a disciplined and authoritative appearance. The uniform includes a buttoned shirt, cargo pants with multiple pockets, and a utility belt with pouches. His hands are bare, and he is equipped with sturdy, high-ankle boots suitable for rugged environments. The figure's posture is upright and formal, with arms slightly extended outward. The overall look suggests a soldier or military personnel prepared for urban or field operations.
description: An adult male in a digital camouflage military uniform, helmet, sunglasses, and boots, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full uniform, helmet, sunglasses, utility belt, and boots with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, facial features, and the side pockets of the cargo pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, uniform, belt, and boots, with arms and hands visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, helmet, and uniform details.
attribute_clothing_type: military uniform with helmet, utility belt, and cargo pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
